name: fx_protocol_leaderboard
description: Near real-time intelligence on f(x) Protocol trading performance. Provides fxUSD borrow rates, top PNL wallet rankings, cross-protocol lending rate comparisons, and premium leaderboard analytics.

capabilities.description: Get latest and historical fxUSD borrow APR. Use to check current borrow cost before opening a leveraged position.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of historical data points to return

capabilities.description: Get highest PNL wallets from the f(x) Protocol leaderboard. Use to identify top-performing traders.
Get full lending rate data across Aave, CrvUSD, and fxUSD. Use to compare DeFi borrow rates.
Get premium leaderboard metrics with top traders by PNL and ROI. Requires x402 USDC payment.

x402_cookie.description: Pay $0.01 USDC per call via x402 protocol on Base network.
x402_cookie.flow: POST /api/x402/session-token to initiate checkout, then access premium endpoints with the resulting cookie.
